{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Underlord Arelius
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Underlord Arelius]] took [[Lindon]] and his companion under his wing.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|“Underlord Arelius was kind enough to take myself and my companion under his wing.”<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
